title: abutilon ranadei
intro: Abutilon ranadei is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the mallow family. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Abutilon ranadei include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
